task_summary: Fix 7 open issues (3 route params, 3 unwired tables, 1 dev credentials)
notes: Tier 1 (route params) + Tier 2 (blog_categories, writing_sessions, quadrant_analytics) + Tier 3 (dev credentials gate)

task_summary: Tier 1: Set up ESLint 9 flat config + Prettier + Husky/lint-staged pre-commit hooks
notes: ESLint pinned to v9 due to react-hooks plugin incompatibility with v10. 26 warnings (lenient), 0 errors.

task_summary: Tier 4: Standardize backend error handling with AppError class, refactor all 10 controllers
notes: 48 handlers refactored. Domain-specific UNIQUE messages preserved. No route file changes needed.

task_summary: Tier 2a: Set up Vitest with workspace config, write 173 unit tests for shared utils and AppError
notes: 5 test files, 173 tests all passing. Root vitest.config.ts needed explicit include/exclude to avoid picking up dist/ and .spec.ts files.

task_summary: Tier 2b: Write Playwright E2E specs for auth, todos, diary, blog, matrix, analytics; wire npm scripts
notes: 7 spec files (6 new + 1 updated), 48 E2E test cases. Shared helper extracted to frontend/e2e/helpers.ts. Playwright config updated to match all *.spec.ts.

task_summary: Tier 3: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow with 3 jobs (quality, unit-tests, e2e-tests)
notes: CI uses vite dev server (not preview) for E2E because Vite proxy is needed for API calls. wait-on added as devDep.
